author: codex-agent

patch.value: Implements pm-8ys5 by preventing acceptance of path-only linked tests that cannot execute, reducing false verification coverage signals.
Enforce command-required linked tests at mutation time
Reject new linked-test entries without command metadata in both pm test --add and create --test flows while retaining safe runtime handling for legacy stored malformed entries.
pm test --add and create --test reject entries missing command metadata; existing malformed stored entries still skip deterministically at runtime with explicit diagnostics.
Epic pm-mf5z exists and mutation/runtime behavior boundaries are confirmed.
Prevent creation of unrunnable linked-test metadata
Improves trust in linked verification coverage
Reduces silent overestimation of test evidence
All newly added linked tests are runnable commands
User-reported pm-8ys5 shows path-only entries are accepted then skipped, masking verification gaps.
Add path-only linked test then run pm test --run and observe non-runnable skip message.
Linked-test mutations require command metadata for new entries.
Path-only linked tests are accepted and later skipped as unrunnable.
Governance sweeps can misreport coverage when linked tests are non-runnable.
